infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app needs access to your photo library to upload venue and court images.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app needs access to your camera to take photos for your venue and court images.

plugins.photosPermission: This app needs access to your photo library to upload venue and court images.
plugins.cameraPermission: This app needs access to your camera to take photos for your venue and court images.
